notes: Frontend-only UX fix. Replaced 3 raw 'Unknown' strings with 'Not analyzed' in aiInsights useMemo fallback. Added hasAiInsight boolean for conditional styling. Fixed sentiment badge (was always green), engagement badge, engagement bar, and Quick Stats cards to show muted null-state when aiInsight is null. Added data-testid attributes for all null-state elements. 18 tests passing (12 new IFC-226 tests + 4 existing + 2 pre-existing). Build, typecheck, lint (no new errors) all pass.
